# ShineWell Cleaning Services

> Family-owned residential and commercial cleaning company serving Overland Park and the greater Kansas City metro (Kansas and Missouri) for over 20 years. Fully insured and bonded ($2M general liability), background-checked cleaners, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee with free re-clean within 24 hours. Rated 5.0 on Google. Free estimates and online booking.

## About

ShineWell Cleaning Services is a locally owned, family-run cleaning company based in Overland Park, Kansas, serving homes and businesses throughout the Kansas City metropolitan area on both the Kansas and Missouri sides. Owner Lina Silva has built the company on trust, consistency, and attention to detail. Every cleaner is background-checked and the company is fully insured and bonded. ShineWell offers flexible weekly, biweekly, and monthly recurring plans as well as one-time deep cleans, move-in/move-out cleaning, post-construction cleanup, and short-term rental (Airbnb) turnovers.

- [About ShineWell](https://shinewellcleaning.com/about): Company story, team, service standards, insurance and background-check policy.
- [Book / Free Estimate](https://shinewellcleaning.com/booking): Request a free, no-obligation quote or schedule service online.

## Services

- [All Services](https://shinewellcleaning.com/services): Full overview of residential and commercial cleaning services across the KC metro.
- [Deep Cleaning](https://shinewellcleaning.com/services/deep-dives): Top-to-bottom detailed reset including baseboards, inside oven and refrigerator, grout, vents, ceiling fans, window tracks, and behind/under furniture.
- [Routine Housekeeping](https://shinewellcleaning.com/services/routine-housekeeping): Recurring weekly, biweekly, and monthly maintenance cleaning for homes.
- [Commercial Cleaning (Kansas City)](https://shinewellcleaning.com/commercial-cleaning-kansas-city): Meticulous, tailored office and commercial cleaning services for Kansas City area businesses.
- [Commercial Deep Cleaning](https://shinewellcleaning.com/services/commercial-deep-cleaning): Office, medical, retail, and business cleaning with after-hours and early-morning scheduling.
- [Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning](https://shinewellcleaning.com/services/move-in-move-out): Complete vacant property sanitization.
- [Post-Construction Detailing](https://shinewellcleaning.com/services/post-construction): Elimination of fine remodeling dust and drywall residues.
- [Compassionate Hoarder Cleanup](https://shinewellcleaning.com/services/hoarder-cleanup): Kind, respectful, and confidential extreme clutter restoration.
- [Professional Organizing](https://shinewellcleaning.com/services/organizing): Structural decluttering and storage custom layouts.
- [Specialized Treatments](https://shinewellcleaning.com/services/specialized-treatments): Fabric upholstery conditioning, leather, and wood care.
- [Junk Hauling & Disposal](https://shinewellcleaning.com/services/junk-removal): Full-service junk cleanouts and hauling logistics.

## Guides and Resources

- [How Often Should You Have Your House Professionally Cleaned?](https://shinewellcleaning.com/blog/how-often-professional-house-cleaning-kansas-city): How to choose between weekly, biweekly, monthly, and one-time cleaning based on pets, kids, allergies, and household traffic.
- [Is Hiring a House Cleaning Service Worth It?](https://shinewellcleaning.com/blog/is-hiring-a-house-cleaning-service-worth-it): Honest breakdown of Kansas City cleaning costs, what you are paying for, and when it is and isn't worth it.
- [Standard Clean vs. Deep Clean: What's the Difference?](https://shinewellcleaning.com/blog/standard-clean-vs-deep-clean-difference): What is included in each type of clean, when you need a deep clean, and how pricing differs.
- [Blog](https://shinewellcleaning.com/blog): Cleaning guides, checklists, and local Kansas City resources.

## Service Area

ShineWell serves the greater Kansas City metropolitan area, including:

**Kansas side:** Overland Park, Leawood, Prairie Village, Olathe, Lenexa, Shawnee, Mission, Merriam, Fairway, Roeland Park, Stilwell, De Soto, Kansas City KS.

**Missouri side:** Kansas City MO, Brookside, the Crossroads, Waldo, Lee's Summit, Independence, Liberty, Raytown, Grandview, Riverside, Parkville.

**North Carolina (regional services):** Wilmington, Raleigh, Charlotte, Durham, Greensboro.

**Business districts served:** Corporate Woods, College Boulevard corridor, downtown Kansas City, the Country Club Plaza area.

## What ShineWell Cleans

Residential: houses, apartments, condos, townhomes.
Commercial: offices, medical and dental suites, retail spaces, salons and studios, property-management common areas.
Specialty: deep cleaning, move-in and move-out cleaning, post-construction cleanup, short-term rental and Airbnb turnovers, interior window cleaning, recurring janitorial service.

## Key Facts

- Locally owned and family-operated, based in Overland Park, Kansas
- Over 20 years serving the Kansas City metro
- Fully insured and bonded, $2 million general liability
- All cleaners background-checked
- 100% satisfaction guarantee: free re-clean within 24 hours
- Rated 5.0 on Google
- Free estimates, flexible scheduling, online booking
- Eco-friendly cleaning products available on request
